de-h-hgr-b.notes: Scaffold for the Stalingrad pilot: identity and subordination only, no authored positions yet. The 1944-45 western Heeresgruppe B is a separate incarnation (not yet authored).

sources.citation: Glantz, D. & House, J. — Stalingrad trilogy (To the Gates of Stalingrad; Armageddon in Stalingrad; Endgame at Stalingrad), 2009–2014
Niehorster, L. — German 6th Army order of battle, 19 Nov 1942

de-h-id-389.notes: Pilot: corps assignment held constant over the pilot window; positions derived from the corps sector (approximate).

sources.citation: Glantz, D. & House, J. — Stalingrad trilogy (To the Gates of Stalingrad; Armageddon in Stalingrad; Endgame at Stalingrad), 2009–2014

su-rd-308.notes: Siberian. Later 120th Guards. Pilot: city positions schematic (west-bank strip); the division held a narrow riverside sector inside the drawn pocket ring, so side checks report it as contested.
